# AI Chat Exporter

> Free Chrome extension to save and export ChatGPT, Gemini, and Google AI Studio conversations to PDF, Markdown, or JSON. 100% local processing — no data ever leaves your browser.

AI Chat Exporter is a privacy-first Chrome extension that runs entirely in your browser. No servers, no accounts, no cloud. Your conversations stay on your device.

## Pages

- [Home](https://ai-exporter.github.io/): Landing page with features, how-it-works, format showcase, and FAQ
- [Privacy Policy](https://ai-exporter.github.io/privacy): Full privacy policy covering data access, permissions, and limited use disclosure
- [Welcome / Onboarding](https://ai-exporter.github.io/welcome): Post-install welcome page with 3-step setup guide

## Features

- Export ChatGPT, Gemini, and Google AI Studio conversations
- Three export formats: PDF (with dark mode), Markdown, JSON
- Copy as Markdown to clipboard
- Auto-generated filenames from your first message
- Full conversation capture with smart scrolling for 100+ message chats
- No server, no API calls, no account required
- Optional anonymous uninstall survey (via Chrome's API)

## Supported Platforms

- chatgpt.com
- chat.openai.com
- gemini.google.com
- aistudio.google.com

## Permissions Used

- activeTab: Read the active conversation tab when you click the extension popup
- scripting: Extract conversation DOM content from the active tab
- downloads: Save generated PDF, Markdown, or JSON files
- storage: Persist local settings (e.g., dark/light mode preference)
- Host permissions: Limited to aistudio.google.com only (for pre-injecting a helper script)
